action.reasoning: Observation: Iter 8 training completed: model with ResNet-50 encoder stride 16, 2D pos enc, trained 10 epochs. Train loss dropped from 2.72 to 1.14, but val loss stagnated around 2.8–2.9 (epoch 4 onwards), indicating overfitting. Model parameter count: 12M. Analysis: baseline exprate (iter 5) was 0.0 with stride-32 model; this improved architecture may yield better results but still likely low. Need to measure exprate to gauge progress and decide next steps (regularization, augmentation, architecture changes). Decision: Submit eval on best_model.pt to get baseline score, then plan improvements based on score and val loss pattern.
